title: GeyserVanishFix
body:
# 🪄 Geyser Invis Fix

A lightweight plugin that automatically fixes **invisible player glitches** commonly experienced on **GeyserMC** or **Floodgate** servers.  
It ensures Bedrock players can consistently see other players without relogging or manual fixes.

---

### ⚡ Performance

- Runs every **10 seconds** asynchronously.
- Only performs simple visibility checks and minimal actions.
- **Extremely lightweight** — no noticeable performance impact, even on larger servers.

---

### 🧩 Compatibility

- ✅ Works with **GeyserMC** and **Floodgate**  
- ✅ Compatible with **Paper**, **Spigot**, **Purpur**, and other modern server forks  
- ⚠️ Java 17+ recommended  

---

### 🛠️ Installation

1. Download the latest `GeyserInvisFix.jar`.
2. Drop it into your server’s `/plugins` folder.
3. Restart or reload your server.
4. No configuration needed — it just works!

---

### 💬 Notes

- This plugin **does not** modify any player data or packets beyond visibility resyncs.  
- Designed for admins tired of "I can’t see my friend!" reports from Bedrock players.

---

### 🧠 Example Scenario

> **Bedrock Player A** can’t see **Java Player B**.  
> After at most **10 seconds**, Geyser Invis Fix will automatically resync Player B’s data, and both players will see each other properly — no relogging needed.

---

### 🪶 Author

**Do_Not_Dusturb**  
Lightweight server tools for seamless Geyser compatibility.
